item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
almost there
yeesh
refreshing
it’s good to have hobbies
oui
Jack on the set of The Shining? I honestly have no idea
mmm hmm
ultimate life hack
aren’t we all?
even if I remember it can be awful
dang
also me
I give up
finally
again?
wait what
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: The hypocrisy is a feature, not a bug
item.dc:creator: stopfGemBaron

item.title: Ooofski!
item.dc:creator: roaduardo

item.title: Day 4 & 5 of Making BG3 Shadowheart Wavemother's Robe cosplay - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/@yuzupyon Hello everyone! I am back with update on my Wavemother project, I had to halt it for a while due to a SKILL ISSUE that I overcame hehe No but seriously, I have always been really intimidated to learn how to use a serger and honestly this was starting to affect the quality of my work so I said ENOUGH COWARDICE, this is the project that will make us learn new skills finally!!!! Instead of glossing over that hiccup I decided to include it in this Making series as to show a bit of the reality behind these projects, not everything you see people do online goes perfect the first time, I had to undo all my work of day 4 and start again on Day 5 after upgrading my sewing stats! If you ever feel stuck about something, it's okay to take a break, learn and come back stronger and you'll be proud of your progress ! You got this!!! Have a great day, Yuzu Note : I'll be shooting this costume soon, pics will be posted on https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon if you wish to see them ?
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: When your food bowl is empty and the stupid human locked themself out again
item.dc:creator: NulltheVoid

item.title: I’m a Pastor and I’m Real Tired of Christian Nationalism
item.description: I’m a Christian pastor and I am against the recent decision in Louisiana that forces schools to display the Ten Commandments in classrooms. Jesus had a lot to say about the people who bragged about how religious and “holy” they were, but at the same time neglected the actual material needs of the people around them. We need to be focusing on feeding the hungry, advocating for prison reform, fixing our broken healthcare system, housing the homeless, and standing up on behalf of the people who are the victims of unjust systems in our society. You know, actually doing the things that Jesus cared about. But unfortunately it sure seems like a lot of my Christian siblings have forgotten that we’re not supposed to be worshipping a white-washed Americanized Jesus, instead of worshipping the actual Jesus who would be completely unrecognizable to the people who claim to follow Him so closely.
item.dc:creator: LiptonTheTurtle

Me, Irl
They look it
Those pastas are uncreepied
ONLY Monika
RIP ICQ
Mood
Oh no
it's coming
The idea of Dick and Kara being bitter exes is such a good one
S A T I R E
=w=
So I am 4 & 6 but I have to say seeing number 9 made me look up where my nearest Tank was ( just found it)
sneef snrof
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii don't shit on a bus.

item.title: Russian family values. Russia doesn’t treat its soldiers as humans.
item.description: Sergei came home on military leave, and his wife died. Now the Russian government sends him to the front and his daughter to an orphanage. Russian soldiers are subhumans to the state and have to kill until they get killed.

item.title: Day 4 of drawing PinUp sketch versions of things I saw on IMGUR
item.description: This was an easy one... as soon as I saw the post by @Stellaloga, i knew that I want to draw her, with a little changes to her outfit. Maybe I could do it again in the future. I also add a new technique to keep the experimentation going
